title: Datasets filter UX: use standard scorecard/score selectors

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing dataset filter UX cleanup: replace mutually-exclusive ad-hoc controls with standard scorecard/score selectors, keep index-backed single-query behavior, and simplify filter interactions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed UX cleanup for /lab/datasets filters: replaced ad-hoc mutually-exclusive filter mode control with standard ScorecardContext selectors (scorecard + score), retained optional direct ID filters for scoreVersionId/dataSourceVersionId, and applied deterministic precedence for single index-backed query selection. Validation: dashboard build:fast succeeded.
